name: sql-migrate
title: sql-migrate
summary: SQL schema migration tool for Go (program)
description:
SQL schema migration tool for Go (program)
sql-migrate is SQL Schema migration tool for Go based on gorp and goose
.
Features
• Usable as a CLI tool or as a library
• Supports SQLite, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL and Oracle databases
(through gorp)
• Can embed migrations into your application
• Migrations are defined with SQL for full flexibility
• Atomic migrations
• Up/down migrations to allow rollback
• Supports multiple database types in one project
• Works great with other libraries such as sqlx

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for sql-migrate.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use sql-migrate because SQL schema migration tool for Go (program).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use sql-migrate as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `sql-migrate [options] [args]` as documented upstream for sql-migrate.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair sql-migrate with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `sql-migrate --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
